title: QT Funded Premiere: The March Madness Double Feature
description: The curtain rises on QT Funded's March Madness, an epic production offering 50% off and a free account to ignite your trading reel!
seo_content:
QT Funded March Madness 50% OFF + FREE Account Deal

QT Funded is running a March Madness double promotion: 50% OFF QT Prime using code QT50, plus a free Instant account of the same size included with your purchase. This dual offer represents an extraordinary combination of upfront savings and immediate funded capital, making it one of the most impactful single promotions QT Funded has released. Whether you prefer the evaluation route or instant access to capital, this deal covers both simultaneously.

QT Funded is part of the QuantTekel financial ecosystem — a technology-forward prop trading environment designed to provide traders with instant profit flow, robust account infrastructure, and competitive trading conditions. The firm has built its identity around offering high-impact promotions backed by a sustainable operational model, and the March Madness offer exemplifies this approach with a deal that delivers dual value for a single purchase price.

With code QT50, the QT Prime challenge is available at half price, and the free Instant account of matching size activates immediately at no additional cost. This means on the day of purchase, you are simultaneously enrolled in a standard challenge evaluation and operating a live funded Instant account from which you can begin generating payouts. The instant account's profit flow starts immediately, providing a financial return while your challenge is still in progress.

QT Funded's trading conditions within the QuantTekel ecosystem include professional platform access, competitive profit splits for both challenge graduates and instant account holders, and clear risk parameters. The QT Prime challenge follows standard prop evaluation rules with defined targets and drawdown limits, while the Instant account operates under a live funded framework with immediate payout eligibility.

To redeem this March Madness deal, click the affiliate link above to reach QT Funded, select the QT Prime challenge at your chosen account size, and enter QT50 at checkout. Both your 50%-discounted challenge and your free Instant account will be confirmed simultaneously in your order. This promotion is valid through December 31, 2026 — purchase at your convenience but act before the promotional window closes.
